text_pt: E assim os exilados fizeram conforme proposto. O sacerdote Esdras escolheu chefes de famílias, um de cada grupo de famílias, todos eles chamados por nome. E no dia primeiro do décimo mês eles se assentaram para investigar cada caso.

text_en: And they made an end with all the men that had taken strange wives by the first day of the first month.
text_pt: No dia primeiro do primeiro mês terminaram de investigar todos os casos de casamento com mulheres estrangeiras.

text_en: And among the sons of the priests there were found that had taken strange wives: {namely}, of the sons of Jeshua the son of Jozadak, and his brethren; Maaseiah, and Eliezer, and Jarib, and Gedaliah.
text_pt: Entre os descendentes dos sacerdotes, estes foram os que se casaram com mulheres estrangeiras: Dentre os descendentes de Jesua, filho de Jozadaque, e seus irmãos Maaséias, Eliézer, Jaribe e Gedalias.

text_en: And they gave their hands that they would put away their wives; and {being} guilty, {they offered} a ram of the flock for their trespass.
text_pt: Todos eles apertaram as mãos em sinal de garantia que iam despedir suas mulheres, e cada um apresentou um carneiro do rebanho como oferta por sua culpa.

text_en: And of the sons of Immer; Hanani, and Zebadiah.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Imer: Hanani e Zebadias.

text_en: And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Harim: Maaséias, Elias, Semaías, Jeiel e Uzias.

text_en: And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Pasur: Elioenai, Maaséias, Ismael, Natanael, Jozabade e Eleasa.

text_en: Also of the Levites; Jozabad, and Shimei, and Kelaiah, (the same {is} Kelita,) Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
text_pt: Dentre os levitas: Jozabade, Simei, Quelaías, também chamado Quelita, Petaías, Judá e Eliézer.

text_en: Of the singers also; Eliashib: and of the porters; Shallum, and Telem, and Uri.
text_pt: Dentre os cantores: Eliasibe. Dentre os porteiros: Salum, Telém e Uri.

text_en: Moreover of Israel: of the sons of Parosh; Ramiah, and Jeziah, and Malchiah, and Miamin, and Eleazar, and Malchijah, and Benaiah.
text_pt: E dentre os outros israelitas: Dentre os descendentes de Parós: Ramias, Jezias, Malquias, Miamim, Eleazar, Malquias e Benaia.

text_en: And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Elão: Matanias, Zacarias, Jeiel, Abdi, Jeremote e Elias.

text_en: And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Zatu: Elioenai, Eliasibe, Matanias, Jeremote, Zabade e Aziza.

text_en: Of the sons also of Bebai; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, {and} Athlai.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Bebai: Joanã, Hananias, Zabai e Atlai.

text_en: And of the sons of Bani; Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Bani: Mesulão, Maluque, Adaías, Jasube, Seal e Jeremote.

text_en: And of the sons of Pahathmoab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Paate-Moabe: Adna, Quelal, Benaia, Maaséias, Matanias, Bezalel, Binui e Manassés.

text_en: And {of} the sons of Harim; Eliezer, Ishijah, Malchiah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Harim: Eliézer, Issias, Malquias, Semaías, Simeão,

text_en: Benjamin, Malluch, {and} Shemariah.
text_pt: Benjamim, Maluque e Semarias.

text_en: Of the sons of Hashum; Mattenai, Mattathah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, {and} Shimei.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Hasum: Matenai, Matatá, Zabade, Elifelete, Jeremai, Manassés e Simei.

text_en: Of the sons of Bani; Maadai, Amram, and Uel,
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Bani: Maadai, Anrão, Uel,

text_en: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Chelluh,
text_pt: Benaia, Bedias, Queluí,

text_en: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib,
text_pt: Vanias, Meremote, Eliasibe,

text_en: Mattaniah, Mattenai, and Jaasau,
text_pt: Matanias, Matenai e Jaasai.

text_en: And Bani, and Binnui, Shimei,
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Binui: Simei,

text_en: And Shelemiah, and Nathan, and Adaiah,
text_pt: Selemias, Natã, Adaías,

text_en: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai, {Machnadebai: or, Mabnadebai, according to some copies}
text_pt: Macnadbai, Sasai, Sarai,

text_en: Azareel, and Shelemiah, Shemariah,
text_pt: Azareel, Selemias, Semarias,

text_en: Shallum, Amariah, {and} Joseph.
text_pt: Salum, Amarias e José.

text_en: Of the sons of Nebo; Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jadau, and Joel, Benaiah.
text_pt: Dentre os descendentes de Nebo: Jeiel, Matitias, Zabade, Zebina, Jadai, Joel e Benaia.

text_en: All these had taken strange wives: and {some} of them had wives by whom they had children.
text_pt: Todos esses tinham se casado com mulheres estrangeiras, e alguns deles tiveram filhos dessas mulheres.
